nodes.label: AI for code-based procedural tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable for subjective analysis
nodes.grounding_span: I asked for the help of AI for a step-by-step instruction on how to make the polyacrylamide gel

nodes.label: AI malleability and responsiveness
nodes.grounding_span: I am able to get AI to rephrase or to go in depth on something specific within seconds

nodes.label: AI trustworthiness and verification
nodes.label_negative: AI untrustworthiness for subjective, high-stakes analysis
nodes.grounding_span: SDS-PAGE and other procedures are set in stone. There are no real variables, subjectivity or interpretation to be done

nodes.label: AI as learning and study aid
nodes.label_negative: AI as shortcut that hinders learning
nodes.grounding_span: using AI will not help me learn, it will just give me the answer

nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
nodes.grounding_span: improvement of AI brainstorming capabilities, by diving into the unknown and helping us with the formation of these hypotheses

nodes.label: Productivity and efficient task completion
nodes.grounding_span: I was on a pretty tight time constraint for this task as well

nodes.label: Skill development and learning
nodes.grounding_span: I wanted to use the project to learn

nodes.label: Scientific understanding and discovery
nodes.grounding_span: speed up the discovery of novel mechanisms which may be able to stop diseases

nodes.label: Frustration with AI for software guidance
Hesitation toward AI for data analysis
nodes.grounding_span: I am unsure of the results it will yield

nodes.label: Aspirational hope for AI as practical assistant
nodes.grounding_span: if we could use AI to help us formulate new hypotheses or new lab techniques to help us

nodes.label: Task-specific compartmentalization
nodes.grounding_span: SDS-PAGE and other procedures are set in stone. There are no real variables, subjectivity or interpretation to be done

nodes.label: Verification-oriented — cross-checks AI outputs against other sources
nodes.grounding_span: the only way to confirm/deny the results from AI is to repeat the work myself
